resources.name: Colorado Municipal League (CML)
resources.summary: Primary trade association for Colorado cities and towns. Publications, training, sample municipal code, legislative tracking. Main switchboard: 303-831-6411.

resources.name: CML – Colorado Municipal Clerk's Reference Guide
resources.summary: Day-to-day clerk reference handbook covering common municipal clerk duties. Order via CML bookstore.

resources.name: CML – Open Meetings, Open Records: Colorado's Sunshine Laws
resources.summary: Authoritative practical guide to Colorado Open Records Act (CORA) and Open Meetings Law. Always consult town attorney for specific requests.

resources.name: CML – TABOR: A Guide to the Taxpayer's Bill of Rights
resources.summary: Plain-language explanation of TABOR limits, ballot requirements, and revenue retention.

resources.name: CML – Election Book
resources.summary: Comprehensive guide to municipal elections in Colorado, including coordinated elections.

resources.name: CML – Governance 101
resources.summary: Foundational orientation for newly elected municipal officials. Free PDF (2019).

resources.name: Colorado Revised Statutes – Title 31 (Government – Municipal)
resources.summary: Statutory law governing statutory cities and towns. Reference these for binding legal requirements.

resources.name: Colorado Revised Statutes – Title 24, Article 72 (CORA / Open Records)
resources.summary: Colorado Open Records Act text. The legal basis for public records requests.

resources.name: Colorado Revised Statutes – Title 1 (Elections)
resources.summary: Election Code – governs municipal election procedures.

resources.name: Colorado Secretary of State
resources.summary: State elections authority, business filings, and notary administration.

resources.name: Department of Local Affairs (DOLA)
resources.summary: Required annual budget filing, audit oversight, local government finance technical assistance, grants.

resources.name: Office of the State Auditor
resources.summary: Establishes audit requirements for local governments; reviews submitted audits.

resources.name: CIRSA – Colorado Intergovernmental Risk Sharing Agency
resources.summary: Risk pool serving most Colorado small towns. Ethics, liability, and best-practices training and handbooks.

resources.name: CMCA – Colorado Municipal Clerks Association
resources.summary: Peer association for municipal clerks. Certification, networking, regional conferences.

resources.name: Municipal Clerk Advisor Program (CML + CIRSA + CMCA)
resources.summary: Free advisor service for Colorado municipal clerks. Karen Goldman, 303-981-8022. Call when stuck on a specific clerk question.

resources.name: Town Attorney
resources.summary: Always consult your municipality's contracted attorney for binding legal questions, CORA judgment calls, contract review, and litigation risk.
